column1: # roborepo required source files — the repo's "packing checklist". doctor.sh asserts each
# of these exists; a missing one means the repo itself is broken (distinct from the install
# manifest, which tracks what gets symlinked into ~/.claude / ~/.codex homes).
# This is a flat list of repo-relative paths, one per line. Comments (#) and blanks skipped.
# NOT listed here (they stay as code in doctor.sh): per-skill SKILL.md checks, which are
# generated by looping over discovered skills, not a fixed list.
